name: content-generator-agent
description: A standalone Python content generator agent that creates TikTok and Rednote short-form social media content on demand.

skills.name: generate_full_post
skills.description: Generate a complete social media post package including title, hook, caption, hashtags, scenes, image prompts, and video prompt.

skills.name: create_viral_caption
skills.description: Generate a short viral caption for TikTok or Rednote content.

skills.name: generate_trending_audio
skills.description: Recommend a trending audio style for a target platform.

skills.name: generate_image_prompts
skills.description: Generate visual prompts for Imagen image generation.

skills.name: generate_video_prompt
skills.description: Generate an 8-second vertical video prompt for Veo 3.
